programme.title: Mister Rogers: It's You I Like
programme.desc: Celebrities, cast members and Joanne Rogers recall their favorite moments from "Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood" as they celebrate the 50th anniversary of the series.

programme.title: Tom Lehrer -- Live in Copenhagen 1967
programme.desc: A rare concert recording from 1967 features 18 of Tom Lehrer's best-known songs, including "The Elements" and "The Vatican Rag.".

programme.title: Amanpour and Company
programme.desc: Christiane Amanpour leads discussions about world issues and interviews with global leaders.

programme.title: One on One With Steve Adubato
programme.desc: Professionals and innovators share their experiences.

programme.title: Nature
programme.desc: Tiger expert Valmik Thapar uncovers 50 years of archival footage chronicling the tiger clan of northwestern India's Ranthambore National Park.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: NOVA
programme.desc: Scientists try to figure out how to predict weather events called "rain bombs" that sink ships and down planes.

programme.title: Wilding
programme.desc: Isabella Tree and her husband, Charlie Burrell, strive to breathe new life into the ailing Knepp estate. They reintroduce native ponies, deer, pigs and other wildlife, allowing nature to thrive.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Independent Lens
programme.desc: A look at American farming through the stories of Midwestern farmers facing increased economic uncertainty.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Muffy wants a Dream Bouncy Castle for her party; Francine and Muffy set up their older siblings.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.sub-title: Xs and Os; Dr. O No
programme.desc: Agents from the Big O's office threaten to shut down Odd Squad; Oona meets Dr. O's replacement.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Wild Kratts
programme.desc: Martin and Chris stumble upon a rare and endangered seedling of a butternut tree; while looking for its parent tree, they only discover dead ones.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Weather Hunters
programme.desc: The Hunters learn how temperatures can affect outdoor plants and gardens.

programme.title: Lyla in the Loop
programme.desc: Lyla and Everett play basketball against their moms; Lyla and Luke restore their old toy car to make it special for Stu.

programme.title: Carl the Collector
programme.desc: Carl can't wait for the ice cream festival; Carl is upset that he has to wear a cast on his broken wrist.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Daniel Plays T-ball; Max Plays at the Library
programme.desc: Daniel and his friends play T-ball and find that Henrietta is a dance teacher and a T-ball coach.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Phoebe & Jay
programme.desc: Phoebe and Jay set a new record for the longest paper airplane fight; Phoebe and Jay learn how to build a stable pillow fort.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: TJ is excited to meet his favorite comic book artist Bobby Manalo, and to make him feel welcomed on Sesame Street, TJ makes him a comic book gift with the help of Tamir; while working on it, Tamir also learns to say a few words in Tagalog.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Work It Out Wombats!
programme.sub-title: The Treeborhood Photo Album; Runway Recycling
programme.desc: Zadie creates a Treeborhood photo album to trace the growth of their beloved tree from little to very big; Mr. E judges a sculpture contest.

programme.title: Let's Learn
programme.sub-title: Can You Hear the Long "o" in Shadow?
programme.desc: Making instruments to explore pitch; learning a dance from Uganda; reading "Shadow"; changing sounds -- long I and long o.

programme.title: Elinor Wonders Why
programme.sub-title: The Little Drummer; Rest Is Best
programme.desc: Ari tries to be quiet so his sister can take a nap, but a woodpecker keeps making noise outside; the kids learn that all animals need some sort of rest to regain energy and stay healthy.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Cyberchase
programme.desc: In an unlikely pairing, the CyberSquad helps Hacker stop a villain who is zapping trees.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Molly of Denali
programme.desc: Molly spends the night at Tooey's house when a blizzard strikes Qyah; Molly loses her fish charm bracelet in an ice hole.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Xavier Riddle and the Secret Museum
programme.sub-title: I Am Julia Child; I Am Neil Armstrong
programme.desc: Watching Julia Child follow a step-by-step recipe encourages Xavier to do the same to build a model airplane; Neil Armstrong inspires Yadina to try new things.

programme.title: Baking With Julia
programme.sub-title: Traditional French Bread With Danielle Forestier
programme.desc: Danielle Forestier bakes French breads including baguettes, boule and pain de Champagne.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Ross tests out smart lighting; Tom helps a homeowner build a custom screen door; Richard gives advice on maintaining a washing machine; Mauro shares techniques to paint old 1960s wood trim.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A W.W. Denslow-inscribed "The Wonderful Wizard of Oz"; a Mercury space capsule wind tunnel model; black opal ring.

programme.title: Amanpour and Company
programme.desc: Christiane Amanpour leads discussions about world issues and interviews with global leaders.

programme.title: BBC News The Context
programme.desc: A regular panel of guests from across the political spectrum discuss the biggest international stories of the day.

programme.title: NJ Spotlight News with Briana Vannozzi
programme.desc: Statewide reporting on the latest news and issues affecting communities across the Garden State.

programme.title: DW News
programme.desc: Presenting a round-up of the most recent news and developments from across the world.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: BBC News America
programme.desc: Live news program produced out of BBC's Washington, D.C. bureau; host Sumi Somaskanda.

programme.title: PBS News Hour
programme.desc: Co-anchors Amna Nawaz and Geoff Bennett and correspondents offer in-depth analysis of current events.

programme.title: Washington Week With The Atlantic
programme.desc: A panel of journalists provides reporting and analysis of the major stories emanating from the United States capital.

programme.title: Firing Line With Margaret Hoover
programme.desc: Actor and filmmaker Ben McKenzie unpacks his documentary "Everyone Is Lying to You for Money" and why he argues the crypto boom is built on hype, risk, and deception.

programme.title: Great Performances
programme.sub-title: Now Hear This: The Call of Istanbul
programme.desc: Exploring the layered sounds of Istanbul where empires met from European classical music to modern jazz.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Shakespeare: Rise of a Genius
programme.desc: Shakespeare's life and legacy are threatened when the Gunpowder Plot unearths a secret he has worked all his life to bury; when his daughter is implicated in the fallout, Shakespeare produces "Macbeth.".

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Amanpour and Company
programme.desc: Christiane Amanpour leads discussions about world issues and interviews with global leaders.

programme.desc: Professionals and innovators share their experiences.

programme.title: Mister Rogers: It's You I Like
programme.desc: Celebrities, cast members and Joanne Rogers recall their favorite moments from "Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood" as they celebrate the 50th anniversary of the series.

programme.title: The Brain-Gut Connection With Dr. Emeran Mayer
programme.desc: Dr. Emeran Mayer explores the interconnectivity between the gut and the brain, and reveals strategies for mental and physical well-being.

programme.title: America's Home Cooking: Flavors of the Fourth
programme.desc: Celebrating picnics and barbecue with Chris Fennimore and the America's Home Cooking team; recipes include horseradish potato salad, baked beans, apple hand pies and more summer favorites.

programme.title: Rick Steves' Europe
programme.desc: Historical sites in Tehran, Iran; tranquil village; anti-American propaganda.

programme.title: Start Up
programme.desc: Detroit Jiu-Jitsu Academy in Dearborn, Mich., has cultivated a community of discipline and respect that prides itself on training "bully-proof" children.

programme.title: Samantha Brown's Places to Love
programme.desc: Exploring Tampa's Ybor City and its Cuban cigar heritage at J.C. Newman; dining at Ulele; making candles at Oxford Exchange; hiking at Hillsborough State Park; Bern's Steak House; kayak fishing at Mobbly Bayou; Sunday Thai Market.

programme.title: Curious Traveler
programme.desc: Exploring Regensburg, Germany, including the Goliath House, Regensburg Cathedral and Stone Bridge; a visit to Eilsbrunn for the Guinness World Record holder for the oldest permanently open inn; a traditional bead-stitching art form.

programme.title: One on One With Steve Adubato
programme.desc: Professionals and innovators share their experiences.

programme.title: Consuelo Mack WealthTrack
programme.desc: Investment tips in stocks, bonds, real estate and collectibles.

programme.title: History With David Rubenstein
programme.desc: Author and historian Marie Arana explains how Spain was involved in the colonies' fight for independence.

programme.title: GZERO World With Ian Bremmer
programme.desc: The renowned political scientist discusses global news and interviews world leaders.

programme.title: Firing Line With Margaret Hoover
programme.desc: Actor and filmmaker Ben McKenzie unpacks his documentary "Everyone Is Lying to You for Money" and why he argues the crypto boom is built on hype, risk, and deception.

programme.title: The Chavis Chronicles
programme.desc: Archaeologist and historian Dr. Cheryl LaRoche discusses AME Bishop Paul Quinn's role in freedom movements.

programme.title: New York Now
programme.desc: Journalists discuss New York state politics and government.

programme.title: To the Contrary With Bonnie Erbé
programme.desc: All-female news analysis of issues and policy affecting the U.S.

programme.title: The Open Mind
programme.desc: Exploring civic life with Alexander Heffner.

programme.title: Think Tank With Steve Adubato
programme.desc: Steve Adubato holds four-person round table discussions that explore issues facing society.

programme.title: Heal Your Gut, Sharpen Your Mind With Steven Gundry, MD
programme.desc: Dr. Steven Gundry reveals how many troubling issues -- brain fog, memory loss, anxiety, weight gain and neurodegeneration -- can all stem from a compromised gut.

programme.title: Tom Lehrer -- Live in Copenhagen 1967
programme.desc: A rare concert recording from 1967 features 18 of Tom Lehrer's best-known songs, including "The Elements" and "The Vatican Rag.".

programme.title: Mister Rogers: It's You I Like
programme.desc: Celebrities, cast members and Joanne Rogers recall their favorite moments from "Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood" as they celebrate the 50th anniversary of the series.

programme.title: Compass Points From PBS News
programme.desc: Experts analyze prominent international affairs topics and America's role in a shifting world.

programme.title: GZERO World With Ian Bremmer
programme.desc: The renowned political scientist discusses global news and interviews world leaders.

programme.title: Tradfest: The Fingal Sessions
programme.desc: Host Fiachna Ó Braonáin, singer-songwriters Wallis Bird and Evie join concertina wizard Brenda Castles to share songs, stories and tunes about bees, folklore, Germany and more.

programme.title: Inspector George Gently
programme.desc: Gently and Bacchus investigate a very disturbed family after the body of young woman was found murdered.

programme.title: Gorillas in the Mist
programme.desc: This film is an adaptation of wildlife expert Dian Fossey's autobiography. Midwesterner Fossey leaves the United States for Africa, where she studies the gorillas of Rwanda and Uganda. As Fossey develops a bond with the animals, she also becomes wary of the poachers who prey on them. Fearing that the gorillas will go extinct if humans continue to hunt them, she organizes a defense league to protect the animals; in doing so, though, she puts herself in a perilous situation.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Sigourney Weaver, The Most Iconic Action Heroine
programme.desc: A look back at actress Sigourney Weaver's career in cinema and the impact of her roles in action, comedy and drama.
